/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Donnit.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Donnit.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Donnit.dir/src/Window.cpp.o -o Donnit  -lnotcurses++ -lnotcurses -lnotcurses-core 3rd_party/matplot++/source/matplot/libmatplot.a -lfmt /usr/lib/libjpeg.so /usr/lib/libtiff.so.6.2.0 /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libpng.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libpng.so /usr/lib/liblapack.so /usr/lib/libblas.so /usr/lib/libfftw3.so /usr/lib/libfftw3f.so /usr/lib/libfftw3l.so /usr/lib/libfftw3_threads.so /usr/lib/libfftw3f_threads.so /usr/lib/libfftw3l_threads.so /usr/lib/libfftw3_omp.so /usr/lib/libfftw3f_omp.so /usr/lib/libfftw3l_omp.so 3rd_party/matplot++/source/3rd_party/libnodesoup.a
